mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS friend_id, u.nickname, NULL AS remark, u.role, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url, COALESCE( ( SELECT c.title FROM user_courses uc_me JOIN user_courses uc_other ON uc_other.course_id = uc_me.course_id AND uc_other.user_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON c.id = uc_me.course_id WHERE uc_me.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY GREATEST(uc_me.enrollment_date, uc_other.enrollment_date) DESC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT c.title FROM user_courses uc_me JOIN courses c ON c.id = uc_me.course_id WHERE uc_me.user_id = #{userId} AND c.teacher_id = u.id AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uc_me.enrollment_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AS course_title FROM user_relationships ur JOIN users u ON ur.action_user_id = u.id WHERE ur.status = 0 AND (ur.user_one_id = #{userId} OR ur.user_two_id = #{userId}) AND ur.action_user_id != #{userId} AND (u.is_deleted IS NULL OR u.is_deleted = 0) ORDER BY ur.created_at DESC
